---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a needed feature for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: ''
assignees: KiCode-UCSD

---

**Describe the feature requirements, outline, etc.**
A clear and concise description of what the parameters for the feature are

**Describe the files needed for this feature (create new or use existing)**
A clear and concise description of what existing files are to be used or new files that need to be created to implement this feature.

**Describe what the "finish condition" for this feature is**
A clear and concise description of when the feature is considered done and ready to push.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
